# PinPoint

> PinPoint is a Next.js project template that helps frontend developers rapidly bootstrap web applications by streamlining the setup and deployment process.

## Full Product Context (GEO)

- [Full documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TaegyuJEONG/PinPoint/main/llms-full.txt)

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/TaegyuJEONG/PinPoint)
